name: Texaf S.A.
summary: Texaf S.A. develops, owns, and leases real estate properties in Kinshasa. It operates through Real Estate and Quarries segments. The company's portfolio comprises 300 homes, including 53 villas and 247 apartments with a total rental surface area of 58,500 square meters; 22,000 square meters of office and commercial space; and 36,000 square meters of warehousing, as well as 700 square meters of TEXAF digital campus. It also supplies red sandstones for building, road construction, and concrete production. The company was founded in 1925 and is based in Brussels, Belgium.
